productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarfly Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike LunarFly +3 Sports shoe is designed for those who love to run. These shoes are ultra light, and are ideal for walking and running. This authentic nike footwear are durable and perfect for fitness enthusiasts to use indoors at the sports club and outdoors. Product Details Leather and mesh upper for lightweight breathable comfort with a lushly padded tongue and collar for snug Fit Central lacing for customised fit Mesh tongue with textile lined collar for comfort Lunarlon technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy return Dynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronation BRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durability EPR forefoot for multi-surface traction Waffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioning Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
